records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.751 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) and Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) were asked:
"We buy clothes that may have come into contact with wine or the fat of a pig during their tailoring. Should we pray in them before washing them?"
They replied: "Yes, there is no harm. Allah (swt) has only forbidden eating and drinking it (pork and wine) but has not forbidden wearing it, touching it, or praying in it."
records.arabicText: 751 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ وَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ فَقِيلَ لَهُمَا إِنَّا نَشْتَرِي ثِيَاباً يُصِيبُهَا اَلْخَمْرُ وَ وَدَكُ اَلْخِنْزِيرِ عِنْدَ حَاكَتِهَا أَ نُصَلِّي فِيهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ نَغْسِلَهَا فَقَالاَ «نَعَمْ لاَ بَأْسَ إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ أَكْلَهُ وَ شُرْبَهُ وَ لَمْ يُحَرِّمْ لُبْسَهُ وَ مَسَّهُ وَ اَلصَّلاَةَ فِيهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.751 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) and Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) were asked:
"We buy clothes that may have come into contact with wine or the fat of a pig during their tailoring. Should we pray in them before washing them?"
They replied:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Yes, there is no harm. Allah (swt) has only forbidden eating and drinking it (pork and wine) but has not forbidden wearing it, touching it, or praying in it."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.752 - Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man who has only one garment, and it has urine on it, but he is unable to wash it.
Imam (as) said: "He should pray in it."
records.arabicText: 752 - وَ سَأَلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ لَهُ اَلثَّوْبُ اَلْوَاحِدُ فِيهِ بَوْلٌ لاَ يَقْدِرُ عَلَى غَسْلِهِ قَالَ «يُصَلِّي فِيهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.752 - Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man who has only one garment, and it has urine on it, but he is unable to wash it.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "He should pray in it."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.753 - He was asked by Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi 'Abdillah about a man who becomes ritually impure (junub) in a garment and has no other garment and is unable to wash it.
Imam (as) said: "He should pray in it."
records.arabicText: 753 - وَ سَأَلَهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُجْنِبُ فِي ثَوْبٍ وَ لَيْسَ مَعَهُ غَيْرُهُ وَ لاَ يَقْدِرُ عَلَى غَسْلِهِ قَالَ «يُصَلِّي فِيهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.753 - He was asked by Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi 'Abdillah about a man who becomes ritually impure (junub) in a garment and has no other garment and is unable to wash it.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "He should pray in it."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.754 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
"He should pray in it, and when he finds water, he should wash it and repeat the prayer."
records.arabicText: 754 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: «يُصَلِّي فِيهِ فَإِذَا وَجَدَ اَلْمَاءَ غَسَلَهُ وَ أَعَادَ اَلصَّلاَةَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.754 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "He should pray in it, and when he finds water, he should wash it and repeat the prayer."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.755 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about a man who is without clothing and the time for prayer arrives, and he finds a garment that is half covered in blood or entirely covered in blood. Should he pray in it, or should he pray without clothing?
Imam (as) said: "If he finds water, he should wash it; if he does not find water, he should pray in it and should not pray without clothing”.
records.arabicText: 755 - وَ سَأَلَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَخَاهُ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عُرْيَانٍ وَ حَضَرَتِ اَلصَّلاَةُ فَأَصَابَ ثَوْباً نِصْفُهُ دَمٌ أَوْ كُلُّهُ دَمٌ يُصَلِّي فِيهِ أَوْ يُصَلِّي عُرْيَاناً قَالَ «إِنْ وَجَدَ مَاءً غَسَلَهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ مَاءً صَلَّى فِيهِ وَ لاَ يُصَلِّ عُرْيَاناً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.755 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about a man who is without clothing and the time for prayer arrives, and he finds a garment that is half covered in blood or entirely covered in blood. Should he pray in it, or should he pray without clothing?
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "If he finds water, he should wash it; if he does not find water, he should pray in it and should not pray without clothing”.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.756 - Safwan ibn Yahya wrote to Abu Al-Hasan, Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) asking about a man who has two garments, one of which has been contaminated with urine, but he does not know which one. When the time for prayer arrives and he fears missing it, and he has no water available, what should he do?
Imam (as) said: "He should pray in both of them."
records.arabicText: 756 - وَ كَتَبَ صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى إِلَى أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: يَسْأَلُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ مَعَهُ ثَوْبَانِ فَأَصَابَ أَحَدَهُمَا بَوْلٌ وَ لَمْ يَدْرِ أَيُّهُمَا هُوَ وَ حَضَرَتِ اَلصَّلاَةُ وَ خَافَ فَوْتَهَا وَ لَيْسَ عِنْدَهُ مَاءٌ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ قَالَ «يُصَلِّي فِيهِمَا جَمِيعاً.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.757 - Muhammad ibn Muslim said to Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about the presence of blood on a garment while in prayer.
Imam (as) said: "If you see it and have another garment with you, remove it and pray in the other garment. If you do not have another garment, continue your prayer, and you do not have to repeat it, provided that the blood does not exceed the size of a dirham.
If it is less than a dirham, it is of no consequence whether you see it or not. But if you saw it and it was more than a dirham's size and neglected to wash it, and you prayed multiple prayers in that state, you must repeat all the prayers you performed in that garment.
However, this is not the same ruling as for semen or urine."
Imam (as) then emphasized that the impurity of semen is more severe than urine and said:
"If you see semen before or after, you must repeat the prayer. If you inspected your garment and did not find it and prayed, there is no need for repetition, and the same applies for urine”.
records.arabicText: 757 - وَقَالَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: اَلدَّمُ يَكُونُ فِي اَلثَّوْبِ عَلَيَّ وَ أَنَا فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ فَقَالَ «إِنْ رَأَيْتَهُ وَ عَلَيْكَ ثَوْبٌ غَيْرُهُ فَاطْرَحْهُ وَ صَلِّ فِي غَيْرِهِ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَيْكَ ثَوْبٌ غَيْرُهُ فَامْضِ فِي صَلاَتِكَ وَ لاَ إِعَادَةَ عَلَيْكَ مَا لَمْ يَزِدْ عَلَى مِقْدَارِ دِرْهَمٍ فَإِنْ كَانَ أَقَلَّ مِنْ دِرْهَمٍ فَلَيْسَ بِشَيْءٍ رَأَيْتَهُ أَوْ لَمْ تَرَهُ وَ إِذَا كُنْتَ قَدْ رَأَيْتَهُ وَ هُوَ أَكْثَرُ مِنْ مِقْدَارِ اَلدِّرْهَمِ فَضَيَّعْتَ غَسْلَهُ وَ صَلَّيْتَ فِيهِ صَلَوَاتُ كَثِيرَةً فَأَعِدْ مَا صَلَّيْتَ فِيهِ وَ لَيْسَ ذَلِكَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلْمَنِيِّ وَ اَلْبَوْلِ» ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلْمَنِيَّ فَشَدَّدَ فِيهِ وَ جَعَلَهُ أَشَدَّ مِنَ اَلْبَوْلِ ثُمَّ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «إِنْ رَأَيْتَ اَلْمَنِيَّ قَبْلُ أَوْ بَعْدُ فَعَلَيْكَ اَلْإِعَادَةُ إِعَادَةُ اَلصَّلاَةِ وَ إِنْ أَنْتَ نَظَرْتَ فِي ثَوْبِكَ فَلَمْ تُصِبْهُ وَ صَلَّيْتَ فِيهِ فَلاَ إِعَادَةَ عَلَيْكَ وَ كَذَا اَلْبَوْلُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.757 - Muhammad ibn Muslim said to Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about the presence of blood on a garment while in prayer.
records.thaqalaynMatn:
Imam (as) said: "If you see it and have another garment with you, remove it and pray in the other garment. If you do not have another garment, continue your prayer, and you do not have to repeat it, provided that the blood does not exceed the size of a dirham.
If it is less than a dirham, it is of no consequence whether you see it or not. But if you saw it and it was more than a dirham's size and neglected to wash it, and you prayed multiple prayers in that state, you must repeat all the prayers you performed in that garment.
However, this is not the same ruling as for semen or urine."
Imam (as) then emphasized that the impurity of semen is more severe than urine and said:
"If you see semen before or after, you must repeat the prayer. If you inspected your garment and did not find it and prayed, there is no need for repetition, and the same applies for urine”.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.758 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"A sword is like a garment; you may pray with it as long as you do not see any blood on it. A bow is also like a garment."
records.arabicText: 758 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ: «اَلسَّيْفُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلرِّدَاءِ تُصَلِّي فِيهِ مَا لَمْ تَرَ فِيهِ دَماً وَ اَلْقَوْسُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلرِّدَاءِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.758 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "A sword is like a garment; you may pray with it as long as you do not see any blood on it. A bow is also like a garment."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.759 - "It is not permissible for a man to pray while there is a sword in front of him, because the Qibla is a place of security."
This was narrated from The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as).
records.arabicText: 759 - «إِلاَّ أَنَّهُ لاَ يَجُوزُ لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ وَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ سَيْفٌ لِأَنَّ اَلْقِبْلَةَ أَمْنٌ » رُوِيَ ذَلِكَ عَنْ أَمِيرِ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.760 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about whether it is permissible for a man to pray while there is a rack with clothes hanging on it in front of him.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm."
records.arabicText: 760 - وَ سَأَلَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَخَاهُ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ وَ أَمَامَهُ مِشْجَبٌ عَلَيْهِ ثِيَابٌ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.760 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about whether it is permissible for a man to pray while there is a rack with clothes hanging on it in front of him.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.761 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about a man praying while there is garlic or onion in front of him.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm."
records.arabicText: 761 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ أَمَامَهُ ثُومٌ أَوْ بَصَلٌ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.761 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about a man praying while there is garlic or onion in front of him.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.762 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about whether it is permissible for a man to pray on growing vegetation (fresh grass).
Imam (as) said: "If he places his forehead on the ground, then there is no harm."
records.arabicText: 762 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَى اَلرَّطْبَةِ اَلنَّابِتَةِ قَالَ «إِذَا أَلْصَقَ جَبْهَتَهُ عَلَى اَلْأَرْضِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.762 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about whether it is permissible for a man to pray on growing vegetation (fresh grass).
Imam (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "If he places his forehead on the ground, then there is no harm."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.763 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about praying on growing grass or lush greenery that covers fresh ground.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm."
records.arabicText: 763 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلصَّلاَةِ عَلَى اَلْحَشِيشِ اَلنَّابِتِ أَوِ اَلثَّيِّلِ وَ هُوَ يُصِيبُ أَرْضاً جَدَداً قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.763 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about praying on growing grass or lush greenery that covers fresh ground.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.764 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked about whether it is permissible for a man to pray with a lamp (or flame) placed in front of him in the direction of the Qibla.
Imam (as) said: "It is not permissible for him to face the fire."
records.arabicText: 764 - وَ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ وَ اَلسِّرَاجُ مَوْضُوعٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ فِي اَلْقِبْلَةِ قَالَ «لاَ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يَسْتَقْبِلَ اَلنَّارَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.764 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked about whether it is permissible for a man to pray with a lamp (or flame) placed in front of him in the direction of the Qibla.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "It is not permissible for him to face the fire."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.765 - As for the narration reported from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) stating: "There is no harm if a man prays while the fire, the lamp, or an image is in front of him, for the One to whom he is praying is closer to him than that which is in front of him,"
records.arabicText: 765 - فَأَمَّا اَلْحَدِيثُ اَلَّذِي رُوِيَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لاَ بَأْسَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ اَلرَّجُلُ وَ اَلنَّارُ وَ اَلسِّرَاجُ وَ اَلصُّورَةُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ لِأَنَّ اَلَّذِي يُصَلِّي لَهُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ اَلَّذِي بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.765 - As for the narration reported from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) stating:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "There is no harm if a man prays while the fire, the lamp, or an image is in front of him, for the One to whom he is praying is closer to him than that which is in front of him,"

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.766 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked about praying while wearing a black cap.
Imam (as) said: "Do not pray in it, for it is the attire of the people of the Fire”.
records.arabicText: 766 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلصَّلاَةِ فِي اَلْقَلَنْسُوَةِ اَلسَّوْدَاءِ فَقَالَ «لاَ تُصَلِّ فِيهَا فَإِنَّهَا لِبَاسُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.767 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said in what he taught his companions:
"Do not wear black, for it is the clothing of Pharaoh."
records.arabicText: 767 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِيمَا عَلَّمَ أَصْحَابَهُ: «لاَ تَلْبَسُوا اَلسَّوَادَ فَإِنَّهُ لِبَاسُ فِرْعَوْنَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.767 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said in what he taught his companions:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Do not wear black, for it is the clothing of Pharaoh."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: Hadith.768 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) disliked wearing black except in three cases: the turban, the shoes, and the cloak.
records.arabicText: 768 - وَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ يَكْرَهُ اَلسَّوَادَ إِلاَّ فِي ثَلاَثَةٍ اَلْعِمَامَةِ وَ اَلْخُفِّ وَ اَلْكِسَاءِ.
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Messenger of Allah (sw) disliked wearing black except in three cases: the turban, the shoes, and the cloak.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.769 - It is narrated that Archangel Jibril, descended upon the Messenger of Allah (sw) wearing a black cloak and a belt with a dagger.
The Prophet (sw) asked: "O’ Archangel Jibril (as), what is this attire?"
Archangel Jibril (as) replied: "It is the attire of your uncle's descendants, O’ Muhammad. Woe to your progeny from the progeny of your uncle al-Abbas."
The Prophet (sw) then went out to al-Abbas and said: "O’ uncle, woe to my progeny from your progeny."
Al-Abbas asked: "O’ Messenger of Allah (sw), should I end myself (to prevent this)?"
The Prophet replied: "The Pen has decreed what is to come."
records.arabicText: 769 - وَ رُوِيَ: أَنَّهُ هَبَطَ جَبْرَئِيلُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فِي قَبَاءٍ أَسْوَدَ وَ مِنْطَقَةٍ فِيهَا خَنْجَرٌ فَقَالَ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ «يَا جَبْرَئِيلُ مَا هَذَا اَلزِّيُّ » فَقَالَ زِيُّ وُلْدِ عَمِّكَ اَلْعَبَّاسِ يَا مُحَمَّدُ وَيْلٌ لِوُلْدِكَ مِنْ وُلْدِ عَمِّكَ اَلْعَبَّاسِ فَخَرَجَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِلَى اَلْعَبَّاسِ فَقَالَ «يَا عَمِّ وَيْلٌ لِوُلْدِي مِنْ وُلْدِكَ» فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ أَ فَأَجُبُّ نَفْسِي، قَالَ «جَرَى اَلْقَلَمُ بِمَا فِيهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad:
Hadith.769 - It is narrated that Archangel Jibril, descended upon the Messenger of Allah (sw) wearing a black cloak and a belt with a dagger.
The Prophet (sw) asked:
records.thaqalaynMatn:
"O’ Archangel Jibril (as), what is this attire?"
Archangel Jibril (as) replied: "It is the attire of your uncle's descendants, O’ Muhammad. Woe to your progeny from the progeny of your uncle al-Abbas."
The Prophet (sw) then went out to al-Abbas and said: "O’ uncle, woe to my progeny from your progeny."
Al-Abbas asked: "O’ Messenger of Allah (sw), should I end myself (to prevent this)?"
The Prophet replied: "The Pen has decreed what is to come."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.770 - Ismail ibn Muslim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said: "Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, revealed to one of His prophets, saying:
'Tell the believers not to wear the attire of My enemies, not to eat the foods of My enemies, and not to follow the paths of My enemies, lest they become My enemies as they are My enemies.'".
records.arabicText: 770 - وَ رَوَى إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ - «أَوْحَى اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَى نَبِيٍّ مِنْ أَنْبِيَائِهِ «قُلْ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ لاَ يَلْبَسُوا لِبَاسَ أَعْدَائِي وَ لاَ يَطْعَمُوا مَطَاعِمَ أَعْدَائِي وَ لاَ يَسْلُكُوا مَسَالِكَ أَعْدَائِي فَيَكُونُوا أَعْدَائِي كَمَا هُمْ أَعْدَائِي ».

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.771 - It has been reported from Hudhayfa ibn Mansur that He said:
"I was with Abu 'Abdillah (as) in Al-Hirah when a messenger from Abu al-Abbas, the Caliph, came to invite him.
So he (Imam (as)) called for a cloak, one side of which was black and the other white. He wore it and then said:
'Indeed, I wear it while knowing that it is the clothing of the people of the Fire.'"
records.arabicText: 771 - فَقَدْ رُوِيَ عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ بْنِ مَنْصُورٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ بِالْحِيرَةِ فَأَتَاهُ رَسُولُ أَبِي اَلْعَبَّاسِ اَلْخَلِيفَةِ يَدْعُوهُ فَدَعَا بِمِمْطَرٍ أَحَدُ وَجْهَيْهِ أَسْوَدُ وَ اَلْآخَرُ أَبْيَضُ فَلَبِسَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «أَمَا إِنِّي أَلْبَسُهُ وَ أَنَا أَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ لِبَاسُ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ.

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.772 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"A man should not pray while wearing an iron ring."
records.arabicText: 772 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «لاَ يُصَلِّي اَلرَّجُلُ وَ فِي يَدِهِ خَاتَمُ حَدِيدٍ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.772 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "A man should not pray while wearing an iron ring."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.773 - He (Messenger of Allah (sw)) said:
"Allah (swt) has not purified a hand that wears an iron ring."
records.arabicText: 773 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَا طَهَّرَ اَللَّهُ يَداً فِيهَا حَلْقَةُ حَدِيدٍ.
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Allah (swt) has not purified a hand that wears an iron ring."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.774 - Ammar al-Sabati narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) regarding a man who prays while wearing an iron ring.
Imam (as) said: "No, and he should not wear it, for it is the attire of the people of the Fire."
records.arabicText: 774 - وَ رَوَى عَمَّارٌ اَلسَّابَاطِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: فِي اَلرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ عَلَيْهِ خَاتَمُ حَدِيدٍ قَالَ «لاَ وَ لاَ يَتَخَتَّمُ بِهِ لِأَنَّهُ مِنْ لِبَاسِ أَهْلِ اَلنَّارِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: Hadith.774 - Ammar al-Sabati narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) regarding a man who prays while wearing an iron ring.
records.thaqalaynMatn: Imam (as) said: "No, and he should not wear it, for it is the attire of the people of the Fire."

records.chapter: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText:
Hadith.775 - Abu al-Jaroud narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that the Prophet said to Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as):
"Indeed, I love for you what I love for myself, and I dislike for you what I dislike for myself.
Do not wear a gold ring, for it is your adornment in the Hereafter.
Do not wear crimson, for it is among the garments of Iblis,
Do not ride on a red saddlecloth, for it is among the mounts of Iblis.
And do not wear silk, for Allah (swt) will burn your skin on the Day you meet Him."
records.arabicText: 775 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو اَلْجَارُودِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَنَّ اَلنَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ لِعَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «إِنِّي أُحِبُّ لَكَ مَا أُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِي وَ أَكْرَهُ لَكَ مَا أَكْرَهُ لِنَفْسِي فَلاَ تَتَخَتَّمْ بِخَاتَمِ ذَهَبٍ فَإِنَّهُ زِينَتُكَ فِي اَلْآخِرَةِ وَ لاَ تَلْبَسِ اَلْقِرْمِزَ فَإِنَّهُ مِنْ أَرْدِيَةِ إِبْلِيسَ ، وَ لاَ تَرْكَبْ بِمِيثَرَةٍ حَمْرَاءَ فَإِنَّهَا مِنْ مَرَاكِبِ إِبْلِيسَ وَ لاَ تَلْبَسِ اَلْحَرِيرَ فَيُحْرِقَ اَللَّهُ جِلْدَكَ يَوْمَ تَلْقَاهُ».
